'''√g-y-v''' ('''kagayav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cumulate|cumulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-y-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cumulate|cumulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √g-y-v
|-
! Lemma
| kagayav
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thigayav || jigayav || shigayav || kigayav
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthugayav || jujugayav || shushugayav || kukugayav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thugayav || jugayav || shugayav || kugayav
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thugayav || jugayav || shugayav || kugayav
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thegayav || jegayav || shegayav || kegayav
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothogayav || jojogayav || shoshogayav || kokogayav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thogayav || jogayav || shogayav || kogayav
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thogayav || jogayav || shogayav || kogayav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gayav || gayav || gayav || gayav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gayav || gayav || gayav || gayav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gayav || gayav || gayav || gayav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gayav || gayav || gayav || gayav
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thægayav || jægayav || shægayav || kægayav
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathagayav || jajagayav || shashagayav || kakagayav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thagayav || jagayav || shagayav || kagayav
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thagayav || jagayav || shagayav || kagayav
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shagayav
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshagayav
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishagayav
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shagayavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshagayavnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishagayavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shagayavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshagayavnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishagayavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shagayavro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshagayavnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishagayavro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shagayavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshagayavnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishagayavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shagayavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshagayavnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishagayavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shagayavng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshagayavnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishagayavng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shagayavya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshagayavnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishagayavya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shagayavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshagayavnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishagayavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shagayavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshagayavnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishagayavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shagayavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagayavnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagayavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shagayavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshagayavnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagayavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shagayavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshagayavnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishagayavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shagayavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagayavnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagayavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shagayavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshagayavnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagayavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shagayavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshagayavnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishagayavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shagayavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshagayavnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishagayavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shagayavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshagayavnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagayavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shagayavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshagayavnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishagayavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shagayavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshagayavnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishagayavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shagayavmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagayavnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagayavmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
